Opcode.name: PCM_OP_PYMT_TOPUP
Opcode.Doc: Performs standard top-ups and sponsored top-ups.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account Poid.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Timestamp of when event started [BRM Server Time].

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Timestamp of when event ended [BRM Server Time]. This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

String.name: PIN_FLD_LOCALE
String.Doc: Locale - This field is used to pass the real time location. Format of the string - "City;State;Zipcode;Country"

String.name: PIN_FLD_ZONEMAP_NAME
String.Doc: Zonemap name - Name of the zonemap to be searched.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_INHERITED_INFO
Substruct.Doc:
Inherited info - container for payment specific fields. Contains either of the following array elements:
VOUCHER_INFO : This array is for Voucher Topup
TOPUP_INFO : This array is for all other topup except Voucher Topup

Array.name: PIN_FLD_VOUCHERS_INFO
Array.Doc: Voucher Info Element-id is not significant, except return values use matching element-ids. This array contains voucher related information

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Billinfo which will get impacted by this topup.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Balance group which will get impacted by this topup.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service Object that will get topped up.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Deal Info of the deal to be purchased.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Deal Poid of the deal to be purchased.

Doc.h:pre: This array contains all the information required for topup info. This array is not required for Voucher topup. Additional conditions for the fields in this array. PIN_FLD_TOPUP_CAP is optional but if provided and the value is greater than 0 , then PIN_FLD_POID (/topup) is mandatory In case of automatic sponsored topups the following fields are mandatory PIN_FLD_PARENT PIN_FLD_ACCOUNT_OBJ PIN_FLD_RESOURCE_ID PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ PIN_FLD_GROUP_OBJ PIN_FLD_GROUP_INDEX PIN_FLD_TOPUP_INTERVAL PIN_FLD_TOPUP_CAP PIN_FLD_NEXT_TOPUP_T PIN_FLD_TOPUP_AMT PIN_FLD_BAL_INFO[0] for sponsor or parent PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ PIN_FLD_BAL_INFO[1] for sponsoree or member PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ In case of Manually sponsored topups PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ is mandatory PIN_FLD_PIN is mandatory PIN_FLD_POID or PIN_FLD_GROUP_OBJ is mandatory If PIN_FLD_GROUP_OBJ is provided then PIN_FLD_GROUP_INDEX is mandatory PIN_FLD_ACCOUNT_OBJ is mandatory

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Deal poid of the deal to be purchased.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc:
Topup poid of recipient.
Standard Topup : This field is required
Sponsored Topup : This field is required if it is not Automatic Sponsored topup and PIN_FLD_GROUP_OBJ is not provided.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Billinfo which will get impacted by this topup.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Balance group which will get impacted by this topup.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_ACCOUNT_OBJ
Poid.Doc:
Account object which will get impacted by this topup.
Standard Topup : This field is optional
Sponsored Topup: This field is required

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service Object that will get topped up.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_INFO
Array.Doc:
Balance group Array. Element of array [0] belongs to Sponsor or parent Element of array [1] belongs to sponsoree or menber
Standard Topup : This field is not required

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Balance Groups of payer and Recipient Payer balance group in BAL_INFO[0] Recipient Balance group in BAL_INFO[1].

Int.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_ID
Int.Doc: Reason ID. It is recorded as property of /event/billing object. See file reasons.locale

Int.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_DOMAIN_ID
Int.Doc: Domain ID of Reason Id. It is recorded as property of /event/billing object. See file reasons.locale

String.name: PIN_FLD_PIN
String.Doc:
Recipient's PIN for validation of ad-hoc topup.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup: This field is required except if it is automatic sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Int.name: PIN_FLD_GROUP_INDEX
Int.Doc:
Recipient's group index where his/her information will be stored.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup : This field is required in all cases if GROUP_OBJ is specified.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_GROUP_OBJ
Poid.Doc:
Recipient's group object, which group he belongs to.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup : This field is required

Int.name: PIN_FLD_RESOURCE_ID
Int.Doc:
Resource id by which the bill transfer will happen.
Standard Topup : Required for non-currency topup. Optional for currency topup. If not provided account's primary currency is considered.
Sponsored Topup: This field is required if it is an Automatic Sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_PARENT
Poid.Doc:
Payer's account poid.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup: This field is required if it is an Automatic Sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_TOPUP_CAP
Decimal.Doc:
Max amount that can be topped in a given billing cycle.
Sponsored Topup: This field is required if it is an Automatic Sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_NEXT_TOPUP_T
Timestamp.Doc:
The date on which the next auto topup is due.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup: This field is required if it is an Automatic Sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Int.name: PIN_FLD_TOPUP_INTERVAL
Int.Doc:
This indicates the interval at which automatic sponsored topup occur.
Standard Topup : This field is not required
Sponsored Topup : This field is required if it is an Automatic Sponsored topup (If BAL_INFO array exist).

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_TOPUP_AMT
Decimal.Doc: Amount to be topped up. Optional standard for auto topups, if not given will be read from /topup object.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CYCLE_TOPPED_AMT
Decimal.Doc: Sum of total topups in the current billing period.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_LAST_TOPUP_T
Timestamp.Doc: The last time this service was topped. Not used for one-time and auto topups.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_PAYINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Payinfo poid. Optional for standard auto topups, if not given will be read from /topup object.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_PAYINFO
Array.Doc: Payinfo object - information for immediate payment. The entire object including inherited fields should be included. This will bypass database lookup.

String.name: PIN_FLD_NAME
String.Doc: Name as it appears on the credit card.

String.name: PIN_FLD_SECURITY_ID
String.Doc: Security ID. Used for credit card fraud prevention. This field stores the 3 digit CVV2 for Visa and 4 digit CID for amex.

String.name: PIN_FLD_BANK_NO
String.Doc: RDFI/Bank ID used for routing transactions.

String.name: PIN_FLD_NAME
String.Doc: Name as it appears on the credit card.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE
Enum.Doc:
Type of failure (Portal defined value) The values can be:
0:Pass.
1:Fail.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_PAY_TYPE
Enum.Doc:
Rquired only for standard one-time topup of currency using cash or check payments. The values can be:
10011:Cash.
10012:Check.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_CASH_INFO
Array.Doc: Cash information. Applicable only for standard one-time topup of currency.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_CHECK_INFO
Array.Doc: Check information. Applicable only for standard one-time topup of currency.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Refer to purchase deal opcode for details specified here.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Poid of the /topup to be used from recurring and auto topups.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object passed into call.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Enum.Doc: Result of the debit operation for standard non-currency resource (pass or fail).

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Billinfo poid.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: BalInfo poid.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service poid.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Results array. The results array will contain the output from following opcodes: rcv_payment (if payment created) or act_usage (for non-currency) or transfer_balance (for sponsored topup). It also contains the loan amount consumed (if any).

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RESULT
Enum.Doc:
Result of the payment collect operation (pass or fail) set in case of standard currency topup. The values can be:
1: Pass(value:PIN_RESULT_PASS).
0: Failed(value:PIN_RESULT_FAIL).

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_LOAN_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information about subscriber loan.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Amount consumed from TOPUP against subscriber loans

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AVAILABLE_LOAN_LIMIT
Decimal.Doc: Available loan amount which can be granted to subscriber

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_LIMIT
Decimal.Doc: Maximum loan amount which can be granted to the subscriber

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Outstanding loan amount which needs to be paid back by subscriber

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: balance group poid.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_ACCOUNT_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Account object of the balance impact.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_ITEM_OBJ
Poid.Doc: payment item poid.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_IMPACT_TYPE
Enum.Doc:
Impact type.Indicates the impact type of the event.
PIN_IMPACT_TYPE_RATED
PIN_IMPACT_TYPE_PRERATED
PIN_IMPACT_TYPE_TAX

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Debit event poid in case of standard non-currency topup. Payment event poid in case of standard currency topup.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_EVENT_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Topup event poid.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_INFO
Array.Doc: If any deal is purchased the ouput of PCM_OP_PYMT_POL_PURCHASE_DEAL output is passed here.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
